Sends a discovery signal that locks the scanner onto a nearby deposit of selected type.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_resonance.name: §dFaint Resonance
create_rns.catalyst.faint_resonance.desc: Achieved by attaching 2 or more resonators of any type to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.resonance.name: §dResonance
create_rns.catalyst.resonance.descriptio: Achieved by attaching 4 or more resonators of any type to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_shattering_res: Achieved by attaching 2 or more shattering resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.shattering_resonance: Achieved by attaching 4 or more shattering resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_stabilizing_re: Achieved by attaching 2 or more stabilizing resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.stabilizing_resonanc: Achieved by attaching 4 or more stabilizing resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.overclock.name: §6Overclocked
create_rns.catalyst.overclock.descriptio: Achieved by attaching a fluid container to a miner and filling it with lava. Lava is consumed while the miner is working.
create_rns.gui.assembly.exception.not_on: Contraption must contain exactly _one_ mine head.
create_rns.gui.assembly.exception.wrong_: Mine head must be facing forward.
create_rns.gui.assembly.exception.minehe: Mine head must be aligned with the bearing.
create_rns.gui.assembly.exception.too_ma: Contraption contains too many Resonators (%1$s max)
Contraption contains too many Resonance Buffers (%1$s max)
create_rns.jei.item_in_group: One of %1$s items in a group
create_rns.ponder.shared.mining_infinite: Deposit blocks contain infinite resources that cannot be simply mined by hand
create_rns.ponder.shared.mining_finite: Deposit blocks contain resources that cannot be simply mined by hand
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_1: Miner bearings create contraptions used for mining
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_2: Each miner contraption must have exactly one mine head directly underneath in order to function
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_3: When assembled, the miner claims deposit blocks below in a certain area
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_4: Each deposit block can only be claimed by a single miner
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_5: While some items can be mined without additional attachments...
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_7: Mine heads can be made bigger when placed on a layer of iron blocks
create_rns.ponder.extracting.text_1: Miners work best when running continuously without interruptions
create_rns.ponder.extracting.text_2: Adding a portable interface can significantly slow them down
create_rns.ponder.extracting.text_3: Controlling interfaces with redstone is the key to maximizing efficiency
create_rns.command.scanner.error.occupie: Chunk is already occupied by another deposit
create_rns.command.scanner.error.caller_: Command must be called by an entity
create_rns.datapack.deposits_n_blocks_ap: Deposits generate ~%1$s blocks apart on average
create_rns.configuration.miningSpeed.too: How many mining operations a miner with no attachments can complete in one hour, at 256 RPM, with one deposit block claimed.
create_rns.configuration.miningRadius.to:
Radius in which a miner can claim deposit blocks for mining. Radius of 2 results in a 5x5 square mining area with the Mine Head in the middle.

§eWarning: active miners have to be reassembled to apply this setting.
create_rns.configuration.miningDepth.too:
How many blocks deep can a miner claim deposit blocks.

§eWarning: active miners have to be reassembled to apply this setting.
create_rns.configuration.infiniteDeposit: Whether deposits never run out of resources.
create_rns.configuration.movableDeposits: Whether deposits can be attached to a contraption or moved by a piston.
create_rns.configuration.maxScanDistance: Maximum scanning distance of the Deposit Scanner in chunks.
